steps.say: Hello there, how is it going?
The name is Rocky. Spelled R, O, C, K, Y.

steps.note: F8 rename: operator relabels rocky -> rick IN PLACE via the API (what the ENROLLED tab calls). Next turn must recognize RICK -- no restart.

steps.say: So do you remember who I am?

steps.note: F8 durability: bounce the service -- the renamed identity must survive from disk (id-map + npy + speakers row).

steps.say: Hello again, it is me once more.
steps.expect: speaker=rick AFTER restart (durable print + id-map entry)
